after_heading: 1. The Deep SSM Idea: A Continuous Linear System, Discretized Two Ways
prompt: A witty, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: a single friendly mechanical box sits at the center of a workshop, and a beam of light passing through it splits into two side-by-side shadows on the wall, one shadow shaped like a tidy chain of stepping stones (a step-by-step recurrence) and the other shaped like a long smooth rippling wave (a single global convolution), while the box itself looks calm and pleased to be two things at once. Style: friendly and approachable like a clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces and body language, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space. Suitable for a technical textbook. The humor is dry, knowing, and immediately readable: a reader who just learned this concept should smile in recognition. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A single mechanical box casts two different shadows on a wall, one shaped like a chain of stepping stones and one shaped like a smooth flowing wave, showing the same state-space layer being both a step-by-step recurrence and a global convolution depending on how you look at it.
caption: One linear-recurrence machine, two faces: it trains as a parallel convolution and runs as a constant-memory scan, the dual nature that powers the whole chapter.

after_heading: 2. HiPPO: Initializing A to Optimally Compress History
prompt: A witty, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: a long unfurling scroll of a fluctuating signal stretches back into the distance behind a small tidy archivist creature, who calmly presses the entire long history into a single neat compact set of nested smooth curves held in its hands, keeping the recent past large and detailed and letting the distant past shrink gracefully but never vanish, looking confident and unhurried. Style: friendly and approachable like a clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces and body language, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space. Suitable for a technical textbook. The humor is dry, knowing, and immediately readable: a reader who just learned this concept should smile in recognition. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A small archivist creature compresses a long unfurling scroll of past signal history into a compact set of nested smooth curves, keeping recent history detailed and distant history gracefully shrunk but never lost, illustrating how HiPPO optimally compresses a long memory.
caption: Long memory done right means compressing all of history into a tidy fixed state, keeping the recent past sharp while the distant past fades gracefully instead of being forgotten.

after_heading: 2. Selection: Making the State-Space Parameters Input-Dependent
prompt: A witty, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: a sharp-eyed gatekeeper stands at a turnstile as a fast river of assorted little tokens streams past, waving the few important-looking tokens through into a glowing memory vault while flicking the bland distractor tokens straight into a bypass chute, reading each one on the fly and deciding in the moment what is worth remembering, with a knowing alert expression. Style: friendly and approachable like a clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces and body language, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space. Suitable for a technical textbook. The humor is dry, knowing, and immediately readable: a reader who just learned this concept should smile in recognition. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: An alert gatekeeper at a turnstile watches a fast stream of tokens flow past, waving important tokens into a glowing memory vault and flicking bland distractor tokens into a bypass chute, illustrating Mamba's input-dependent selective scan choosing what to remember and what to ignore.
caption: Selection is the gatekeeper a fixed recurrence never had: by letting its parameters depend on the input, Mamba decides on the fly what to remember and what to wave past.

after_heading: 1. From Softmax Attention to a Linear Recurrence
prompt: A witty, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: on one side an overwhelmed clerk frantically draws a dense web of strings connecting every item on a huge board to every other item, drowning in the quadratic tangle, while on the other side a relaxed clerk simply keeps a single rolling ledger jar that it tops up with one scoop per item as they arrive, carrying the same accumulated summary forward at a steady pace and looking serene. Style: friendly and approachable like a clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces and body language, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space. Suitable for a technical textbook. The humor is dry, knowing, and immediately readable: a reader who just learned this concept should smile in recognition. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A frantic clerk tangles every item on a board to every other with a dense web of strings while a calm clerk instead keeps a single rolling ledger updated one scoop at a time, contrasting quadratic softmax attention with linear attention rewritten as a constant-memory running recurrence.
caption: Drop the softmax and attention collapses from an everything-to-everything tangle into a single running tally, the recurrent form that RWKV and RetNet exploit for constant-memory inference.

after_heading: 1. The Continuous-Depth Idea: From a Residual Step to an ODE
prompt: A witty, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: a traveler who used to hop across a sparse line of discrete stepping stones now instead glides smoothly downstream in a little boat on a continuous flowing river that follows the very same path, the old stepping stones dissolving into the smooth current beneath, the traveler looking pleasantly surprised at how effortlessly continuous the journey has become. Style: friendly and approachable like a clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces and body language, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space. Suitable for a technical textbook. The humor is dry, knowing, and immediately readable: a reader who just learned this concept should smile in recognition. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A traveler who once hopped across discrete stepping stones now glides smoothly down a continuous flowing river along the same path as the stones dissolve into the current, illustrating how a Neural ODE replaces the residual network's discrete steps with a continuous-depth flow solved by an integrator.
caption: Let the layers blur into a continuum and the discrete residual steps become a smooth flow, a differential equation the solver follows wherever you ask for the next state.

after_heading: 2. Neural Controlled Differential Equations: Reading the Data as a Path
prompt: A witty, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: a focused boater steers continuously down an irregular winding river whose current is the data path itself, the river arriving in uneven gappy stretches with some side channels dried up or missing, yet the boater keeps adjusting the rudder smoothly in response to wherever the current actually pushes, navigating the ragged uneven flow without ever stopping to wait for a missing piece. Style: friendly and approachable like a clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces and body language, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space. Suitable for a technical textbook. The humor is dry, knowing, and immediately readable: a reader who just learned this concept should smile in recognition. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A boater steers continuously down an irregular gappy winding river whose current is the data itself, with some side channels dried up or missing, adjusting the rudder smoothly in response to the actual flow, illustrating how a Neural CDE drives its dynamics with an interpolated data path through irregular, partially observed time.
caption: A Neural CDE is a boat steered continuously by the data current itself, so ragged timestamps and missing channels become just an uneven flow to navigate, no imputation required.

after_heading: 1. The Grand Unification: One Recurrence, Many Hats
prompt: A witty, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: four characters wearing very different costumes (a vintage filter engineer, a structured-matrix tinkerer, a sharp-eyed selective gatekeeper, and a kernel-juggling attention acrobat) all stand in a row and lift their disguises at once to reveal they are the same identical clockwork creature underneath, each one having simply obtained its inner gears a different way, exchanging knowing amused glances at the shared secret. Style: friendly and approachable like a clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces and body language, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space. Suitable for a technical textbook. The humor is dry, knowing, and immediately readable: a reader who just learned this concept should smile in recognition. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: Four differently costumed characters representing the Kalman filter, the structured state-space model, the selective Mamba, and linear attention all lift their disguises to reveal the same identical clockwork creature underneath, illustrating that all four are instances of one linear-recurrence template differing only in how their matrices are obtained.
caption: Pull off the costumes and the Kalman filter, the structured SSM, selective Mamba, and linear attention are one clockwork recurrence underneath, differing only in how each one got its matrices.
